name: remotion
description: Remotion video creation skills — best practices, animations, audio, captions, 3D, and more for building programmatic videos with React.

interface.shortDescription: Video creation best practices for Remotion
interface.longDescription: Domain-specific knowledge for building programmatic videos with Remotion and React. Covers animations, timing, audio, captions, 3D, transitions, charts, text effects, and more.
defaultPrompt: Use Remotion to create a video with animated text and transitions.
Use Remotion to build a data visualization video with animated charts.
Use Remotion to add captions and audio to a video composition.
